description: Observe-Act cache for deterministic replay of successful action patterns
how_it_works: 1. First run: AI finds and executes action → succeeds
2. Cache it: Save pattern (URL + selector + action type)
3. Next run: Check cache → if match → execute deterministically (no AI call)
4. Self-heal: If cached pattern fails → invalidate, fall back to AI

cache_format.url_pattern: string — URL pattern to match (supports wildcards)

context.page_state: string — what the page looked like when this worked
context.prerequisites: array — steps that must run before this

scoring.low_confidence: < 50 — use AI instead, re-cache on success

on_failure: 2. If score drops below 50 → invalidate pattern
4. If AI succeeds → create new cache entry

cache_rules: Only cache successful patterns — never cache failures
Track success/fail counts for confidence scoring
Self-heal: if cached action fails, invalidate and use AI
Site-scoped: different accounts don't share cache
URL pattern matching supports wildcards: linkedin.com/feed/*
Cache persists across sessions (stored in modules/action-cache.json)

matching.combined: URL + element selector must both match
